title: Health Regeneration
attribution: Content from Liquipedia Dota 2 wiki (Health Regeneration)
text:
HealthManaHealth RegenerationMana RegenerationLifestealSpell LifestealRestoration ManipulationChangelogs
  

“
Link▶️ I feel I may bloom!— Treant Protector

”

Health Regeneration determines the amount of health a unit regains each second. It is shown as a small number with a + sign at the right side of the unit's health bar.
Heroes also gain bonus health regeneration based on their  strength. Each point of strength increases the hero's health regeneration by 0.1HP.
Health regeneration heals the unit in 0.1-second intervals. This rate cannot be changed by anything. Health regeneration has no cap.
Health regeneration is affected by health regeneration manipulation. When increased or reduced, the HUD shows the increased/reduced values.

Attribute

Bonus Health Regeneration

 Strength

+0.1HP

Total health regeneration can be defined as
Base Health Regeneration
+ (0.1 ×  Strength)
± Flat Bonus Health Regeneration Values
± % Bonus Current/Max Health Regeneration Values
× (1 ± % Restoration Manipulation Multiplier)

Base Health Regeneration[edit]
Most units have a set base health regeneration, differing from unit to unit.

Summons[edit]
None of the summoned wards have base health regeneration. All other summoned units have the following base regen:

UnitHealth RegenerationAstral Spirit, Familiar0Earth, Storm, Fire2/4/6/8Warlock Golem25/50/75
Modifying Health Regeneration[edit]
Just like for mana regeneration, there are many abilities and items which can change how fast a unit regenerates health. Most of them increase health regeneration rate by adding a flat bonus, but some also increase it based on certain things, like health or attributes. They can be passive bonuses which grant a permanent bonus or be conditionally activated, or be short, but grant a strong bonus.

Abilities[edit]
The following abilities affect a unit's health by granting health regeneration bonus, they are not considered as healing.

Health Regen Manipulation[edit]
Main Article: Restoration manipulation
Health regeneration manipulation refers to any form of amplification and reduction applied to health regeneration.

Health Regen Manipulation Sources
 Chen – Divine Favor
 Dark Willow – Pixie Dust
 Mars – Dauntless
 Night Stalker – Heart of Darkness
 Omniknight – Guardian Angel2a

Health Regen Decrease Sources
 Necrophos – Heartstopper Aura1
 Venomancer – Poison Sting1
 Vhoul Assassin – Envenomed Weapon

1 Requires  talent.
2a Requires  Aghanim's Scepter. Capped at 100%

Recent Changes[edit]
Main Article: Health/Changelogs

VersionDescription

7.33(2023-04-20)

Reduced hero base health from 200 to 120.
Increased health bonus per  strength from 20 to 22.
ADDED  special health bars to display hero attacks to destroy for ward-type units.

7.27(2020-06-28)

The following mechanics now stack multiplicatively, instead of additively:
Heal manipulation
Health regen manipulation
Lifesteal manipulation
Spell lifesteal manipulation

7.26a(2020-04-21)

Fixed the following mechanics to not allow negative heal, health regeneration, and lifesteal values.
Heal manipulation
Health regen manipulation
Lifesteal manipulation
